diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -22,34 +22,79 @@
         out = self.relu(out)

         return out

 

-class ImprovedMLP(nn.Module):

+class SpecializedMLP(nn.Module):

     def __init__(self, input_dim=124, output_dim=128, hidden_dims=[512, 512, 256]):

-        super(ImprovedMLP, self).__init__()

-        layers = []

-        prev_dim = input_dim

+        super(SpecializedMLP, self).__init__()

         

-        # Initial projection layer

-        layers.append(nn.Linear(prev_dim, hidden_dims[0]))

-        layers.append(nn.BatchNorm1d(hidden_dims[0]))

-        layers.append(nn.ReLU())

-        layers.append(nn.Dropout(0.1))

+        # Shared feature extractor

+        shared_layers = []

+        shared_layers.append(nn.Linear(input_dim, hidden_dims[0]))

+        shared_layers.append(nn.BatchNorm1d(hidden_dims[0]))

+        shared_layers.append(nn.ReLU())

+        shared_layers.append(nn.Dropout(0.1))

         

-        # Add residual blocks for the first few hidden layers

-        for i, hidden_dim in enumerate(hidden_dims):

-            if i == 0:  # Skip the first since we already have the projection

-                continue

-            if i < len(hidden_dims) - 1:  # Only apply residual blocks to intermediate layers

-                layers.append(ResidualBlock(hidden_dim))

-            else:  # Last layer doesn't need residual connection

-                layers.append(nn.Linear(hidden_dims[i-1], hidden_dim))

-                layers.append(nn.BatchNorm1d(hidden_dim))

-                layers.append(nn.ReLU())

-                layers.append(nn.Dropout(0.1))

+        # Add residual blocks for shared representation

+        for i in range(len(hidden_dims)-1):

+            shared_layers.append(ResidualBlock(hidden_dims[0]))

         

-        # Output layer

-        layers.append(nn.Linear(hidden_dims[-1], output_dim))

+        self.shared_network = nn.Sequential(*shared_layers)

         

-        self.network = nn.Sequential(*layers)

+        # Separate heads for different output types

+        # Temperature tendency (60 values)

+        self.temp_head = nn.Sequential(

+            nn.Linear(hidden_dims[0], 256),

+            nn.BatchNorm1d(256),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Dropout(0.1),

+            nn.Linear(256, 60)

+        )

+        

+        # Humidity tendency (60 values)

+        self.humid_head = nn.Sequential(

+            nn.Linear(hidden_dims[0], 256),

+            nn.BatchNorm1d(256),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Dropout(0.1),

+            nn.Linear(256, 60)

+        )

+        

+        # Radiation components (6 scalars)

+        self.radiation_head = nn.Sequential(

+            nn.Linear(hidden_dims[0], 128),

+            nn.BatchNorm1d(128),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Dropout(0.1),

+            nn.Linear(128, 6)

+        )

+        

+        # Precipitation components (2 scalars)

+        self.precip_head = nn.Sequential(

+            nn.Linear(hidden_dims[0], 128),

+            nn.BatchNorm1d(128),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Dropout(0.1),

+            nn.Linear(128, 2)

+        )

+        

+        # Additional scalar outputs (net shortwave, downward longwave)

+        self.other_scalars_head = nn.Sequential(

+            nn.Linear(hidden_dims[0], 128),

+            nn.BatchNorm1d(128),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Dropout(0.1),

+            nn.Linear(128, 2)

+        )

     

     def forward(self, x):

-        return self.network(x)
+        shared_features = self.shared_network(x)

+        

+        temp_out = self.temp_head(shared_features)

+        humid_out = self.humid_head(shared_features)

+        radiation_out = self.radiation_head(shared_features)

+        precip_out = self.precip_head(shared_features)

+        other_scalars_out = self.other_scalars_head(shared_features)

+        

+        # Concatenate all outputs

+        output = torch.cat([temp_out, humid_out, radiation_out, precip_out, other_scalars_out], dim=1)

+        

+        return output
